since_last: 45% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.89%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -3.91% · Gold -2.33% · Nasdaq100 +0.00%. 45% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.89%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.89%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -1.35%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: UPST is the standout at +5.18%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +5.18%, INTU +4.10%, RXRX +3.79%, ZBRA +3.77%, PUBM +3.56%. Laggards: SMR -5.11%, OKLO -4.97%, OKLO -4.97%, ORCL -4.63%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.36% at $156.68
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.36% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
